home.faq1Q: What is the DevB Smart Site Safety System (4S)?
home.faq1A: The Smart Site Safety System (4S) is a framework set out by the Hong Kong Development Bureau (DevB) under Technical Circular (Works) No. 3/2023. It mandates 4S adoption in public works contracts exceeding HK$30 million. The system comprises smart safety devices, a communication network, and a centralised management platform to monitor site safety in real time.
home.faq2A: We develop smart construction site solutions — both IoT hardware and software platforms — that are practical, easy to use, and designed to genuinely work on site. Our goal is to make smart construction technology accessible and useful, not just a compliance checkbox.
home.faq3Q: Do you only serve public works projects?
home.faq3A: No. While our solutions are designed to meet DevB 4S requirements for public works, they are equally suitable for private construction projects. The CIC and DevB have jointly launched the 4S Labelling Scheme to encourage adoption across both public and private sectors.
home.faq4Q: Can your platform integrate with existing systems?
home.faq4A: Yes. Our CMP (Construction Management Platform) is designed as a centralised hub that can integrate data from various IoT devices and third-party systems, providing a unified dashboard for site safety monitoring, alerts, and reporting.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.content:
Loading Technology Company ("we", "us", or "our") is committed to protecting your privacy. This Privacy Policy explains how we collect, use, and safeguard your personal information when you visit our website or use our services.

Information We Collect: We may collect personal information you provide directly, such as your name, email address, phone number, and company name when you submit inquiries, request quotations, or register for an account. We also automatically collect certain technical data including IP addresses, browser type, and usage analytics.

How We Use Your Information: We use the information we collect to respond to your inquiries, process quotations and orders, provide customer support, improve our products and services, and send relevant communications about our solutions.

Data Protection: We implement appropriate technical and organizational security measures to protect your personal data against unauthorized access, alteration, disclosure, or destruction. Your data is stored on secure servers and access is restricted to authorized personnel only.

Third-Party Sharing: We do not sell or rent your personal information to third parties. We may share information with trusted service providers who assist in operating our website and conducting our business, subject to confidentiality agreements.

Your Rights: Under the Hong Kong Personal Data (Privacy) Ordinance (Cap. 486), you have the right to access and correct your personal data. To exercise these rights, please contact us at charlesloading1997@gmail.com.

Contact Us: If you have any questions about this Privacy Policy, please contact us at charlesloading1997@gmail.com or call +852 6109 9058.

terms.title: Terms of Service
terms.content:
Welcome to Loading Technology Company. By accessing or using our website and services, you agree to be bound by these Terms of Service.

Services: Loading Technology develops and provides smart construction site solutions including IoT hardware, software platforms, system integration, and support services. All products and services are subject to availability and may be modified at our discretion.

Quotations and Orders: Quotations provided through our platform are valid for the period stated on the quotation document. Prices are in Hong Kong Dollars (HKD) unless otherwise specified. Orders are confirmed upon acceptance of a quotation and receipt of the required deposit payment.

Payment Terms: Payment terms are as specified in individual quotations and order confirmations. Late payments may incur additional charges. All prices are exclusive of applicable taxes unless stated otherwise.

Intellectual Property: All content on this website, including text, graphics, logos, software, and documentation, is the property of Loading Technology Company and is protected by intellectual property laws. You may not reproduce, distribute, or create derivative works without our prior written consent.

Limitation of Liability: To the maximum extent permitted by Hong Kong law, Loading Technology shall not be liable for any indirect, incidental, special, or consequential damages arising from the use of our products or services.

Warranty and Support: Hardware products are covered by manufacturer warranties as specified at the time of purchase. Software support and maintenance terms are defined in individual service agreements.

Governing Law: These Terms are governed by and construed in accordance with the laws of the Hong Kong Special Administrative Region. Any disputes shall be subject to the exclusive jurisdiction of the Hong Kong courts.

Contact Us: For questions regarding these Terms, please contact us at charlesloading1997@gmail.com or call +852 6109 9058.
